summary: Frontend-only testing for MegaRadio cache/race condition bug fixes. All 6 reported issues VERIFIED FIXED: Home loads properly, country change refreshes data immediately, genres tab works, genre detail pages show stations (not empty), All Stations loads with 51814 count, Discoverable genres shows exactly 3 genres (Folk, Jazz, Rock).

minor.issue: Multiple 400 status errors from favicon/logo requests - likely invalid image URLs in station data

issues: Discoverable genre images fail to load (404 from themegaradio.com) - falling back to gradient colors which still looks good

country_change_refreshes_immediately.evidence: [LocationStore] setCountryManual: Turkey -> [HomeScreen] Country changed to: Turkey - Invalidating and refetching all data -> [stationService] Got 12 popular stations for Turkey

genre_detail_shows_stations.evidence: Pop: 100 stations, Folk music: 79 stations - NOT empty lists

all_stations_loads.evidence: All Stations page shows 51814 total stations with grid

discoverable_genres_shows_3.evidence: [genreService] getDiscoverableGenres result: 3 genres - Folk music, Jazz Music, Rock

critical_code_review_comments: stationService.ts correctly removed local caching - direct API calls only
genreService.ts correctly removed local caching - direct API calls only
useQueries.ts has staleTime: 0 forcing fresh data on every mount
HomeScreen refetches data when country changes via useEffect dependency on country
Discoverable genres API returning correct 3 genres (Folk, Jazz, Rock)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cache/race condition issues have been resolved. Local cache was completely removed from stationService, genreService. All React Query hooks now have staleTime: 0. Data loads fresh on every mount and country changes trigger immediate refresh. All reported bugs are fixed and verified working.

original_issues: 1. Country change doesn't refresh data immediately
2. All Stations doesn't load on first launch
3. Discoverable genres showing wrong data (all genres instead of 3)
4. Genre detail pages showing empty list
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Local caching in services was causing stale data to persist. staleTime settings in React Query were too high.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Local cache completely removed from stationService, genreService. staleTime set to 0 (always fetch fresh). HomeScreen refetches on country change.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: All 6 test cases passed - data loads correctly, country change triggers immediate refresh, discoverable genres shows exactly 3
